subject:

emails.subject:
RE: Rate Agreement between DWR and the PUC Regarding
 Creditworthiness
emails.subject_base:
Rate Agreement between DWR and the PUC Regarding
 Creditworthiness
emails.body: RE: Rate Agreement between DWR and the PUC Regarding Creditworthiness Thanks Jeff. On a related note, we are trying to put together a financial "headroom" forecast for DWR/State of California that goes out a few years and shows: Rate Revenues less: Utility gen costs QF costs DWR PPA's DWR spot purchases Margin Total Deficit Bond Issue Bond Principal Interest Would you know how to get something like that? Regards, Chris To: Calger, Christopher F.; Comnes, Alan; Shapiro, Richard; skean@enron.com; Steffes, James; Yoder, Christian; Kaufman, Paul
